final_prompt.prompt:
Create a brand color palette and typography specification sheet for "染秋 (RAN QIU)", an autumn fragrance brand.

Style/medium: needs an East Asian editorial brand-guideline aesthetic — exact layout execution is yours
Composition: must be a brand style guide sheet showing primary colors, secondary colors, and typography specimens in a single flat layout
Subject: must include the brand identity system for 染秋 (RAN QIU):
  Primary palette: autumn-derived colors drawn from osmanthus, persimmon, maple leaf, oolong tea
  Secondary palette: warm spice tones drawn from cinnamon, sandalwood, amber
  Typography: Chinese + Latin type pairing specimen showing 染秋 / RAN QIU wordmark and supporting typeface
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: needs a warm, muted autumn direction — tones of deep amber, burnt persimmon, osmanthus gold, smoky oolong, maple rust — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a subtle ink-wash or dyed-fabric texture reference evoking traditional Chinese 染 (dyeing) craft — exact surface treatment is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋" and "RAN QIU" and the three fragrance line names: "桂花乌龙" / "琥珀枫叶" / "柿霜暮色"
Constraints: must preserve all color swatches labeled with names, primary and secondary color groups clearly separated, typography shown at multiple weights/sizes
Avoid:
